channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sugar-coated therapy boosts survival against deadly brain cancer by 50% in mice
item.description: An experimental treatment uses sugar to bypass the blood-brain barrier, improving survival in mice with glioblastoma.

item.title: New Alzheimer's drug repairs DNA damage and reduces brain inflammation
item.description: A drug originally for spinal cord injury shows promise in Alzheimer's mouse studies by repairing DNA damage and reducing inflammation.

item.title: Scientists develop camera capable of tracking invisible particles in 3D
item.description: A new particle detector, PLATON, may replace millions of tiny components with a single light-producing block.

item.title: Sun-like star observed consuming one of its own planets
item.description: A distant Sun-like star appears to have devoured a planet, leaving an unusual chemical signature.
